title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 650.150 - Citation of law
text:
650.150.  Citation of law. — Sections 650.150 to 650.165 shall be known and may be cited as the "Intergovernmental Drug Laws Enforcement Act".
(L. 1993 S.B. 180 § 2, A.L. 2014 S.B. 491) 
Transferred 2014; formerly 195.501: Effective 1-01-17
